title: elaphoglossum ciliatosquama
intro: Elaphoglossum ciliatosquama is a species of fern in the Elaphoglossum genus, native to tropical regions and characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum ciliatosquama include its potential to ease coughs, reduce fever, and soothe irritated airways, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, with some practitioners also using it in poultices or infusions to target specific health concerns.
